diagnosis_requirements.description: Primary or secondary osteoarthritis of knee, or other qualifying knee pathology

medical_necessity_criteria: Failed conservative treatment for at least 3 months
Conservative treatment includes: physical therapy, NSAIDs, corticosteroid injections
Imaging confirming Kellgren-Lawrence Grade III or IV osteoarthritis
BMI documented (BMI >40 may require additional justification)
documentation_requirements: Clinical notes documenting conservative treatment history with dates
Imaging report (X-ray or MRI) with radiologist interpretation
Physical therapy records or letter of medical necessity from PT
